title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING/INCOME RESTRICTED PROPERTIES - 211info
text: PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC AFFORDABLE HOUSING/INCOME RESTRICTED PROPERTIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing for low and moderate-income households. Affordable housing means that rent is not subsidized or income-based, but rents are below fair market value. May give preference to applicants involuntarily displaced from North/Inner Northeast Portland at any time since 2000 due to increasing rents or the sale of residency property. 6329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Household income must be at least 1.5 times the rent amount (or hold a qualifying rental assistance voucher) and cannot exceed 60% Area Median Income for the City of Portland. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 288-2923 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 288-2923 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for pre-application. All units are filled through waitlists. FEES: None for pre-application. $35 application screening fee for each person age 18 and older with a non-refundable cashier's check or money order due when the household's pre-application reaches the top of the waitlist. Rents vary by unit. DOCUMENTS: Each household member age 18 and older must complete a separate waitlist application. The following documents must be provided: -Valid photo ID for each person age 18 and older who will reside in the household -Proof of verifiable income for the past 30 days (pay stubs or current award letter for those receiving TANF, SSI, or Unemployment In -Copy of most recent income tax form or W-2 AREA SERVED: North, Northeast, and Inner Southeast Portland (zip codes 97203, 97211, 97212, 97213, 97217, 97218, 97220, 97227, and 97232) Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME RETENTION AND REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC
